title: Geno takes aim at NCAA tournament setup, prep
content: UConn women's basketball coach Geno Auriemma has questions about the NCAA's decisions on its tournament and seeks more input for coaches and players into tournament matters.

title: Hidalgo: ND won't be 'starstruck' by UConn again
content: Notre Dame said it is not the same team that got blown out by UConn earlier this season ahead of the rivals' first clash in the Elite Eight.

title: Olson leads Michigan past Louisville into Elite 8
content: Olivia Olson's 19-point outing helped No. 2 Michigan defeat Louisville 71-52 on Saturday and advance to the Elite 8 in the Women's NCAA Tournament.

title: After Olympic pain, Malinin wins third world title
content: Six weeks after a disastrous skate knocked Olympic gold medal favorite Ilia Malinin off the podium, the "Quad God" reeled off one huge jump after another, and a backflip for good measure, to retain his world championship title for the third year running.

title: Denver sets NWSL attendance record at Mile High
content: Denver Summit set the NWSL attendance record in their inaugural home game, bringing in a crowd of 63,004 against the Washington Spirit.

title: Injured Penguins Crosby, Malkin to sit vs. Stars
content: Penguins stars Sidney Crosby and Evgeni Malkin are day-to-day with injuries and will not play Saturday against the Stars, coach Dan Muse said.

title: Izzo scoffs at retirement talk after Spartans' exit
content: Michigan State coach Tom Izzo sounded as if he wasn't even considering the possibility of retirement after Friday's Sweet 16 loss, saying, "Why? What the hell am I going to do?"

title: Diaz thrills L.A. with trumpet entrance, 1st save
content: Dodgers closer Edwin Diaz said it was "pretty fun" hearing his entrance music at Dodger Stadium for the first time before he locked down his first save with his new team in a 5-4 win over the Diamondbacks.

title: 🏀 What's next for eliminated women's teams
content: After Sweet 16 losses, what are the portal priorities for the Tigers Gophers, Tar Heels and Commodores?

title: Predictions, previews for Saturday's Elite Eight
content: ESPN's college hoops crew agrees on which teams will advance from Illinois vs. Iowa and Arizona vs. Purdue.

title: Men's March Madness 2026: Ranking the remaining eight teams
content: The regional finals look a little chalky -- with 9-seed Iowa in the mix. Let's rank the teams once more.

title: The unlikely rise of Iowa's Ben McCollum, Bennett Stirtz: Division II to Elite Eight
content: Ben McCollum and Bennett Stirtz have won NCAA tournament games four straight years. This is their deepest run yet.

title: NBA playoff watch: 76ers, Hornets clash in key seeding matchup
content: Can Philadelphia or Charlotte move into the top six? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Thursday.

title: What's next for Michigan State, St. John's, Alabama and Iowa State: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: Their NCAA tournament runs ended early and now it's all about next season. Here's how it's taking shape.

title: Ted Ginn Jr., AJ McCarron and Chris Redman begin pro coaching careers in familiar spots
content: The UFL comes out swinging in Columbus, Louisville and Birmingham with familiar college stars as coaches.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

title: Man City show why they are worthy WSL title winners as tired United wilt
content: Women's Super League champions-elect Manchester City thrashed second-place Man United to go 11 points clear and show why they are the best around.

title: A former NFL GM's must-draft board for 2026: Tannenbaum pounds the table for 14 prospects
content: From Dillon Thieneman on Day 1 to Jaffer Murphy late on Day 3, Mike Tannenbaum picks the draft prospects he'd want to target across all seven rounds.

title: Latest NFL draft buzz: Ty Simpson's pro day and more
content: How high could QB Ty Simpson get picked? Is Jeremiyah Love really a possibility for the Titans at No. 4?

title: LeBron to LeBron Jr.: James duo makes history as first father-son teammates to record assist to each other
content: The father-son duo etched their names in the history books after the elder James found his son for a 3-pointer.

title: Lehigh Valley IronPigs poke fun at Zack Wheeler's rib removal in rehab promo
content: The Phillies' ace had a rib removed as part of a surgery to remove a blood clot -- and kept it in his closet.

title: Women's college hoops: UConn remains title favorite as upsets shake up tourney odds
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Salah eyes Roma after Liverpool exit
content: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah is considering a return to Roma when he moves on in the summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: Kohli, Padikkal shine as RCB chase down 202 with ease against SRH in season opener
content: Chasing 202, RCB reached 203 for 4 in 15.4 overs. Padikkal scored 61 off 26 balls, while Kohli remained unbeaten on 69 from 38 deliveries. The pair added 101 runs for the second wicket in just 45 balls after the early dismissal of Phil Salt.

title: TN polls SWOT analysis: Can Stalin hold Dravidian fortress or will Vijay’s TVK disrupt old order?
content: Tamil Nadu's political landscape is shifting from a bipolar contest to a multi-cornered fight, with the DMK facing anti-incumbency and a fragmented opposition. New entrant TVK and established players like AIADMK and NTK are vying for influence, making this election a crucial transition phase for the state's political future.

title: After Zoji La avalanche deaths, Ladakh hill council stakes claim on Zero Point
content: Addressing a press conference in Drass, LAHDC-Kargil councillors praised the Army, civil administration and Ladakh Police for prompt rescue efforts and retrieval of bodies from the snow following the accident on Friday afternoon. However, they expressed surprise over “J&K Police investigating the incident on Saturday morning”. While J&K claimed the area to be part of its territory, its administrative machinery was always slow to respond when any mishap occurred there, they alleged.

title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang on how he manages 60 direct reportees who are mostly engineers
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang leads over sixty direct reports. He avoids one-on-one meetings, favoring collective problem-solving sessions. This approach ensures all team members receive the same information and can contribute. Huang believes in 'extreme co-design' and expects active participation. He is willing to address employees who do not contribute as expected.

title: Over 3000 J&K govt schools have under 10 students: Minister
content: Of the 3,192 such schools,1494 are in Jammu division and 1,698 in Kashmir, National Conference’s (NC) Itoo said in a written reply to a question from BJP legislator RS Pathania. In Jammu, Kathua district has the highest number of such schools at 508. In Kashmir, Baramulla district tops the list of such schools with 396.

title: Bangladesh denies lifting IPL broadcast ban, says suspension still in place
content: In a statement issued on Saturday and reported by Bangladesh news outlet Daily Star, the Bangladesh broadcasting ministry said the previous government’s order is still effective. It added that it has sought the opinion of the ministry of youth and sports, with a letter sent on March 25, 2026, and any further decision will depend on that response.

title: Virat Kohli drops sitter vs SRH, Anushka Sharma's reaction goes viral - Watch
content: Virat Kohli's dropped catch in the IPL opener against Sunrisers Hyderabad was a moment of drama, but he later redeemed himself by dismissing the same batter. Ishan Kishan's explosive 80 powered SRH to 201/9, despite a strong bowling performance from RCB's Jacob Duffy. The match saw several crucial wickets fall, with Kishan's innings being a highlight.

title: Meta is rebranding employee titles, roles as it goes AI-native: What it said in memo
content: Meta's Reality Labs is undergoing a significant internal overhaul, rebranding employees as 'AI builders' and forming smaller, AI-focused teams. This strategic shift aims to boost engineering productivity and product quality, with CEO Mark Zuckerberg envisioning AI dramatically transforming work.  These new 'AI pods' will foster cross-functional collaboration, with dedicated leads managing operations and performance.

title: Massive blaze at Kuwait airport after Iran drone strike, fuel tanks hit
content: A massive blaze at Kuwait International Airport, triggered by a suspected Iranian drone strike on fuel storage facilities, has been extinguished after nearly 58 hours. The attack caused significant damage to radar systems, with Kuwait blaming Iran and its proxies. This incident escalates regional tensions as Iran expands its aerial campaign.

title: CEOs of two of biggest American companies, Coca Cola & Walmart, are leaving due to AI
content: Two prominent CEOs, from Coca-Cola and Walmart, have cited the rise of AI as a factor in their decisions to step down. Both leaders indicated that the evolving business landscape, driven by AI, necessitates new leadership for future growth phases. Their departures highlight a significant technological shift impacting executive decision-making at major corporations.

title: Phil Salt steals the show with outrageous one-handed catch to remove Ishan Kishan - Watch
content: Phil Salt's spectacular one-handed catch ended Ishan Kishan's blistering 80-run knock, a pivotal moment in the IPL 2026 opener.  Despite Kishan's brilliance, which anchored Sunrisers Hyderabad's innings, Salt's fielding heroics, including another debated boundary catch, shifted momentum. Hyderabad ultimately posted 201/9, a total that felt short after Salt's impactful contributions.

title: Anushka cheers virat, bonds with Mandhana, Jemimah at RCB IPL 2026 opener
content: Anushka Sharma made a stylish return to the IPL 2026 stands at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium, cheering for husband Virat Kohli. Joined by WPL stars Smriti Mandhana and Shreyanka Patil, her presence delighted fans. Social media buzzed with her elegant appearance and fans' requests for her to wear an RCB jersey.

title: RCB honour victims with special tribute during IPL opener at Chinnaswamy
content: Cricket returned to Bengaluru's M Chinnaswamy Stadium with a revamped fan experience, though a poignant tribute marked the anniversary of a past tragedy. While many praised smoother entry and improved security, some faced minor inconveniences with new protocols. Over 2,000 personnel ensured crowd management, leading to less congestion. A minute's silence honored victims before play commenced.

title: Ashwin first Indian-capped player in MLC, to play alongside Pakistan’s Haris Rauf
content: Veteran Indian spinner Ravichandran Ashwin is set to make history as the first Indian-capped player in Major League Cricket, joining the San Francisco Unicorns for the 2026 season. Ashwin, a celebrated international cricketer, expressed his excitement about the league's growth and his commitment to helping the Unicorns secure a championship.

title: Watch: US releases video of strikes on Iranian naval vessels
content: The US released video of strikes on Iranian naval vessels, claiming to have destroyed 92% of their largest ships. This campaign, now in its fourth week, has reportedly overwhelmed Iran's air defenses. Separately, an Iranian strike wounded 12 American personnel in Saudi Arabia, disrupting global energy supplies.

title: Jannik Sinner plays golf with Greg Norman before Miami Open final
content: Jannik Sinner shared a relaxed moment with golf legend Greg Norman before the Miami Open 2026 final. Norman even helped him with his golf swing. While the moment went viral, Sinner stayed focused on tennis. He heads into the final unbeaten in sets and will face Jiri Lehecka, where he holds a strong winning record.

title: JD Vance says he’s 'obsessed' with UFOs, believes aliens are actually demons
content: US Vice President JD Vance declared his "obsession" with investigating government UFO files, vowing to uncover the truth during his remaining term. He controversially suggested that these phenomena are not extraterrestrial but rather "demons," aligning with a Christian interpretation of celestial beings.

title: How oil swings and supply snags are testing India's energy resilience
content: How Hormuz disruptions, benchmark volatility and refinery economics are testing India's energy resilience — and why the government moved to shield every pump in the country

title: Pakistan still a base for terrorists targeting India, says US report
content: Pakistan is grappling with a severe surge in terrorist violence, with terrorism-related deaths skyrocketing to 4,001 in 2025, the highest in over a decade. The report highlights the nation as a hub for numerous armed groups, many designated as Foreign Terrorist Organizations, with Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and Balochistan bearing the brunt of the attacks.

title: IPL 2026: Who is Abhinandan Singh? Meet RCB’s debutant who dismissed Virat Kohli twice
content: Uttar Pradesh pacer Abhinandan Singh made his IPL debut for Royal Challengers Bengaluru against Sunrisers Hyderabad, a remarkable rise from tennis-ball cricket just four years ago.  His impressive intra-squad performances, including dismissing Virat Kohli, secured his spot amidst RCB's bowling challenges.  This debut marks a significant moment for the young talent.

title: Olympic champion Tom Pidcock survives crash, finishes Catalunya stage
content: Two-time Olympic champion Tom Pidcock escaped serious injury after a frightening crash during stage five of the Volta a Catalunya. The British rider fell into a ravine while descending at high speed. The incident left him briefly stranded, as no one immediately realized where he had crashed. Despite the severity of the fall, Pidcock managed to communicate through his race radio. He was later able to rejoin the race.

title: ‘Complete nonsense’: Nihal Sarin on Dutch No. 1 Anish Giri ‘drawish’ tag before Candidates - Exclusive
content: As the 2026 Candidates tournament approaches, Dutch Grandmaster Anish Giri faces the lingering "King of Draws" stereotype. Indian Grandmaster Nihal Sarin refutes this, highlighting Giri's fighting spirit and recent FIDE Grand Swiss victory as proof of his winning intent. Sarin also offers his predictions for the volatile Open and Women's Candidates fields.

title: Tyson Fury’s 'wild' lion training ahead of Makhmudov fight goes viral
content: Tyson Fury made headlines after being seen handling a live lion during his training camp in Thailand. The video has gone viral just weeks before his upcoming heavyweight bout. The Gypsy King is preparing to face Arslanbek Makhmudov on April 11 at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. The unusual moment, captured in Pattaya, showed Fury calmly walking the animal on a chain and even petting it, drawing attention from fans worldwide.

title: Delhi civic fines set for overhaul; fines for dogs without leash set at Rs 1,000
content: Delhi is set to significantly increase penalties for various civic violations, including a jump from Rs 50 to Rs 1,000 for letting pet dogs roam unleashed in public. The Jan Vishwas Bill 2025 proposes higher fines for issues like cattle tethering, defacing house numbers, and sanitation offenses, aiming to rationalize penalties and decriminalize minor infractions.

title: Explained: Why ISL clubs want FanCode over Genius Sports as commercial partner
content: Genius Sports and FanCode have submitted bids for Indian Super League (ISL) and Federation Cup commercial rights, with Genius Sports offering a significantly higher amount. While the  All India Football Federation (AIFF) favours Genius Sports' larger upfront offer, ISL clubs prefer FanCode's more sustainable financial structure, leading to a divergence in opinions on the long-term deal.

title: Explained: Why RCB players will wear black armbands against SRH in IPL 2026 opener
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru will begin their IPL 2026 title defense against Sunrisers Hyderabad, wearing black armbands to honor eleven fans who tragically died in a stampede following last year's victory. Coach Andy Flower stated that Virat Kohli is in excellent form and "peak of his powers" for the upcoming season.

title: Pakistan cricketer in big trouble! PCB cracks down after ‘Queen’ jibe at Maryam Nawaz
content: Pakistan cricketer Naseem Shah faces a show-cause notice from the PCB for a social media post allegedly criticizing Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz. The tweet, quickly deleted with a hacking claim, was seen as a jab at her security escort during the PSL opener.

title: Great Indian Bustard chick born in Gujarat after a decade through jumpstart approach: Environment Minister
content: The field monitoring team is observing the young chick being reared by its foster mother in its natural habitat after a significant achievement in the recovery of the critically endangered species

title: Why is there controversy over the Central Armed Police Forces (General Administration) Bill?
content: Why was the Bill introduced in the Rajya Sabha? Why is there opposition to it? What is the government’s justification?

title: Chhattisgarh Govt cracks down on LPG cylinder hoarding, 97 FIRs registered
content: A comprehensive review of the availability and supply of petroleum products, LPG cylinders, fertilisers and other essential commodities was undertaken during a high-level review meeting chaired by Chief Minister Vishnu Deo Sai

title: What did the Supreme Court rule on Scheduled Castes and religion?
content: What did the Supreme Court say about Scheduled Caste status for those not belonging to Hinduism, Sikhism, or Buddhism? Can SC status be restored through reconversion? What is the Centre’s position on SC status for Dalit Muslims and Christians? What about Scheduled Tribes?

title: T.N. Assembly election: Vijay calls on CEO, given nod to hold public meeting at Perambur in Chennai
content: In a petition submitted to the official, he says law and order mechanisms were not being applied uniformly, seeks immediate transfer of key officials including the Director-General of Police

title: Finance Bill fails to address LPG shortage, says DMK MP P. Wilson
content: India is now among the world’s largest LPG consumers, with annual demand touching nearly 31 million tonnes, but has storage capacity sufficient for barely three to four weeks

title: Former AIADMK leaders allotted DMK tickets
content: O. Panneerselvam gets Bodinayakanur; his supporters R. Vaithilingam and Manoj Pandian have been fielded in Orathanadu and Alangulam

title: Tiger poisoned to death near Satpura Reserve; five arrested
content: According to officials, the decomposed body of the female tiger was found buried outside the Reserve’s boundary in the Sangakheda range of the West Chhindwara Division after which the forest officials swung into action.

title: J&K House condemns attack on Abdullah; Minister Itoo questions silence of police, Home dept.
content: J&K Peoples Conference legislator Sajad Lone said the governments in J&K “have been using security cover for political ends”

title: T.N. Assembly election: Premallatha to contest in Vriddhachalam; Virudhunagar allotted to Vijayaprabakaran
content: The party was allotted 10 Assembly constituencies and a Rajya Sabha seat by the DMK. The party’s treasurer L.K. Sudhish was elected as a Rajya Sabha Member recently

title: T.N. Assembly election: DMK candidate list includes 60 fresh faces and 4 Mayors
content: The list also includes 19 women candidates. Of the 164 nominees, 15 are doctors, 17 engineers, 29 advocates, and seven hold Ph.Ds

title: BIMS’ golden jubilee fete ends, alumni association takes shape
content: Past students felicitate D. Anand, senior professor, who is retiring after an impressive journey in the Department of Studies in Business Administration

title: CRPF officer who lost leg in line of duty battling pain, stagnant career
content: Ajay Malik, an Assistant Commandant with CRPF, lost his leg after he stepped on an IED in Jharkhand forest; retired CAPF personnel say officers face career stagnation though they work under grave conditions

title: When defeat becomes apparent person loses control over words, says Samajwadi Party on PM Modi’s ‘ATM for loot’ jibe
content: Opposition party states Noida evolved as an economic engine because of planned industrial clusters, affordable housing, metro connectivity, and opportunities for small and medium enterprises initiated by previous SP government

title: Justice Nagarathna calls for making fragile, sensitive ecosystems absolute no-go zones
content: The judiciary is compelled to step in and drive environmental governance due to legislative gaps, regulatory inertia, and rapidly evolving environmental risk, says the Supreme Court judge

title: Bengaluru South City Corporation budget 2026–27 focuses on infra push with ₹3,826-crore outlay
content: A key administrative reform includes the creation of 72 new wards with plans to establish ward offices to bring governance closer to citizens.

title: 2 Indian, 1 Pakistani ships cross Strait of Hormuz
content: Two other LPG carriers belonging to the state-owned SCI had crossed the strait and have discharged their cargo in India.

title: LPG shortage cripples hostels and small hotels in Vizianagaram
content: Over 15,000 bachelors and job aspirants struggle for food as commercial gas scarcity forces closures and black market rates surge to ₹6,000

title: NDA will retain power in Assam with more than 90 seats, says Amit Shah
content: Participating in a roadshow for BJP’s Guwahati Central candidate Vijay Kumar Gupta, the Union Home Minister underlines performance by the incumbent government and the Centre’s infrastructure push

title: Amit Shah releases ‘charge sheet’ against Trinamool government in West Bengal
content: Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has “always played the politics of the victim card”, says Mr. Shah; BJP trying to blur the lines between Bengalis and Bangladeshis for electoral gain, claims TMC

title: LPG crisis: Cooking gas crunch revives firewood economy in rural and semi-urban Karnataka
content: The surge in demand, triggered by supply constraints linked to the ongoing West Asia crisis, has given rise to a parallel, largely informal firewood market in many districts

title: Economist recommends single, uniform GST rate applied to all domestic consumption
content: Recommends redistributing the entire revenue equally to every citizen as a per capita digital transfer via Aadhaar-linked accounts

title: Gobar gas plants at homes provide a shield to residents of Belagavi’s Kattanbavi amid cylinder shortage
content: Most of the houses in this village of around 1,200 people have gobar gas plants; they were set-up 30-35 years ago, but are still functioning

title: Six leaders from Uttarakhand BJP join Congress as party steps up attack on Dhami-led government
content: Congress general secretary and Uttarakhand in-charge Kumari Selja says the public’s trust in the party is rising amid a growing dissatisfaction with the BJP government in the State

title: IPL 2026: High emotions & strict protocols around Bengaluru’s Chinnaswamy stadium
content: The inaugural match of Indian Premiere League (IPL), 2026, commenced at Bengaluru’s M. Chinnaswamy stadium on Saturday (March 28, 2026).

title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026: Who will win the minority vote pie?
content: With the Assembly elections approaching, all three fronts are once again making concerted efforts to appeal to minority voters

title: TN Assembly Elections 2026: In Vellore Assembly constituency, residents are unhappy over tardy work under Smart Cities Mission project
content: A resident complains that work done under the project drains the taxpayers’ money; other issues that plague the Vellore constituency include improper re-laying of damages stretches that lead to waterlogging during rain and traffic rule violations

title: Watch: EPS vs Perception: The battle for control in NDA
content: Is AIADMK leader Edappadi K Palaniswami truly in control of the NDA in Tamil Nadu, or is perception shaping a different story? This video explores the growing narrative battle between EPS and his rivals, the BJP’s role, and how optics, alliances, and strategy are influencing voter sentiment.

title: PM inaugurates Noida International Airport; operations yet to begin
content: Civil Aviation Minister K. Ram Mohan Naidu said that Noida International Airport will be developed as an aerotropolis and not just an airport

title: BJP seal row: Two officials relieved of election duties
content: A Deputy Chief Electoral Officer and a Section Officer have been removed from duties related to the April 9 Assembly elections and sent back to their parent offices

title: Watch: IPL 2026: Vidyut Sivaramakrishnan Breaks Down RCB & SRH Squads | The Hindu IPL Podcast 2026
content: The opening match of the 2026 Indian Premier League is between Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Sunrisers Hyderabad, takes place at M. Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru on Saturday, March 28, 2026.

title: Over 4 Lakh Kitkat Bars Stolen After Leaving Factory In Italy For Poland
content: The shipment of the crunchy bars, made of waffles covered with chocolate, disappeared last week while en route between production and distribution locations.

title: Speeding Thar Kills 2 Children, Their Grandfather In Gurugram
content: Zayed Khan and Ishant, aged eight and 10, died on the spot, while their maternal grandfather, 60-year-old Subhash, died in a hospital.

title: Iran War LIVE: Israel Army Says Struck Iran Complex Producing Naval Weapons
content: The war in the Middle East began when the US and Israel conducted strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and other senior leaders.

title: "Kissing My A**": Trump Takes A Jibe, Then Praises Saudi Crown Prince
content: Speaking at a Saudi-backed investment forum in Florida, Donald Trump said that the Saudi Crown Prince did not expect the US to make a strong comeback under his presidency.

title: Thousands Of Marines Add To Largest US Buildup In Middle East In 20 Years
content: Photos posted by CENTCOM show soldiers in combat fatigues wearing helmets and goggles. The Marines supplement the 50,000 US troops already stationed in the Middle East.

title: On Camera, Odisha MLA Fires Shot In Air During Ram Navami Procession
content: Although the firing involved blank rounds, discharging shots in the middle of a large gathering raised serious questions about public safety and violation of established protocols.

title: Iran Strikes Kuwait, Dubai As President Issues Warning To Gulf Neighbours
content: In a statement, the Guards said that the strike was carried out using home-grown ballistic missiles, such as Qadr 380 cruise missiles, which have a range of 1,000 kilometres.

title: Suspected Bomb Attack Outside Bank Of America Building In Paris Foiled
content: One of the suspects, holding a lighter, was attempting to ignite a device, while the second suspect managed to escape.

title: Israel Kills 3 Journalists in Lebanon Strike, Claims 1 Was Hezbollah Member
content: Ali Shoeib of Hezbollah's Al Manar channel and Fatima Ftouni of Al Mayadeen, seen as close to the Iran-backed movement, were killed in Jezzine, alongside Ftouni's brother, a cameraman.

title: UP Man Beheads Ice-Cream Seller, Carries His Head Home. Then Cooks Meal
content: The victim has been identified as Bablu, who had gone to Parsawal village, as he did on most days, to sell ice cream.

title: Nashik 'Godman' Tried To Influence Maharashtra Cabinet Picks: Opposition
content: An opposition leader said the self-styled godman was in contact with state NCP president Sunil Tatkare and tried to ensure that an MLA was not made a minister.

title: Adani Defence And Aerospace Delivers First Batch Of 'Prahar' Guns To Indian Army
content: The 7.62 mm-calibre weapons are part of a larger order of over 40,000 guns and have been produced in India under the 'Make in India' programme.

title: 2 India-Bound LPG Tankers Cross Strait Of Hormuz
content: The US-Israeli war against Iran has all but halted shipping through the strait, but Iran said this week that "non-hostile vessels" may transit the waterway if they coordinate with Iranian authorities.

title: Delhi Man's Date Turns Into Nightmare: Kidnapped, Robbed Of Rs 7 Lakh
content: The victim, Anuroop Narula, said that a girl with a profile named 'Sherry' on a dating app called '3F' invited him to meet at Delhi's Nehru Place area.

title: Ranking coaches and teams that are likely to improve in 2026
content: new head coach sumrall evaluates some of the Gators' top playmakers . he says if you create a player rating or any sort of new attacking stat, you probably didn't do it right . we're still only a couple of months removed from what will forever go down as one of the most unlikely and awe-inspiring national title runs of our lifetimes .
